argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const origOpen = window.open; window.__jdUrlMap = {}; window.open = function(url, target, features) { const idMatch = url.match(/(\d{6,})/); if (idMatch) window.__jdUrlMap[idMatch[1]] = url; return null; }; return { hooked: true }; }

async (globalVars) => { const limit = {{ limit }}; const maxPages = 5; const data = globalVars.extractData || []; globalVars.pageCount = (globalVars.pageCount || 0) + 1; if (data.length >= limit || globalVars.pageCount > maxPages) return false; const normalize = v => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const cards = document.querySelectorAll('div.plugin_goodsCardWrapper'); for (const el of cards) { const skuEl = el.closest('[data-sku]') || el.querySelector('[data-sku]'); const sku = skuEl?.getAttribute('data-sku') || el.getAttribute('data-sku') || ''; if (!sku) continue; const text = normalize(el.textContent); if (text.length < 10) continue; const priceMatch = text.match(/¥([\d,.]+)/); const price = priceMatch ? '¥' + priceMatch[1] : ''; let title = ''; if (priceMatch) { const beforePrice = text.substring(0, text.indexOf('¥')); title = beforePrice.replace(/^(海外无货|京东超市|自营|秒杀|新品|预售|PLUS)/, '').trim(); } if (!title || title.length < 4) continue; let shop = ''; const shopMatch = text.match(/(\S{2,15}(?:旗舰店|专卖店|自营店|官方旗舰店|京东自营旗舰店|京东自营))/); if (shopMatch) shop = shopMatch[1]; if (skuEl && skuEl.children[0]) skuEl.children[0].click(); data.push({ title: title.slice(0, 80), price, shop, sku, url: '' }); } if (data.length >= limit) return false; window.scrollTo(0, document.documentElement.scrollHeight || document.body?.scrollHeight || 0); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const nextBtn = document.querySelector('div[class*="_pagination_next_"]'); if (!nextBtn) return false; nextBtn.click(); return { pageCount: globalVars.pageCount, extractData: data }; }

async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }}; const all = intermediate.extractData || []; const seen = new Set(); const deduped = []; for (const item of all) { if (!item.sku || seen.has(item.sku)) continue; seen.add(item.sku); deduped.push(item); } const items = deduped.slice(0, limit); for (const item of items) { item.url = window.__jdUrlMap?.[item.sku] || ''; item.rank = items.indexOf(item) + 1; } return {extractData: items}; }
